_comment: Single source of truth for this repo's git workflow. Read by .githooks/* (commit-msg, pre-push), the /sync-branch and /open-pr skills, scripts/protect-branch.sh, scripts/check-protection-drift.sh, and CI (.github/workflows/git-policy.yml). Byte-identical across every Rigel template. Never encode any of these rules a second time anywhere else. Patterns are POSIX ERE (grep -E / JS / python re / GitHub all accept them) so the shell hooks need no node, husky, jq, or python.
